remaining_tasks.name: Wave 3 - Landing Page
remaining_tasks.progress: HomePage.jsx rewritten with GSAP animations, need to verify it visually and complete other pages

remaining_tasks.name: Wave 4 - Auth & Utility Pages
remaining_tasks.progress: LoginPage.jsx rewritten, RegisterPage.jsx and NotFoundPage.jsx remaining

decisions.decision: Substitute Beni with Antonio and Clash Grotesk with Inter
decisions.rationale: Commercial fonts are not available via standard Google Fonts; Antonio and Inter maintain the same design and weight weights.
Reduces dependency overhead and makes the animation logic easier to debug in a single self-contained file.

next_action: Modify RegisterPage.jsx and NotFoundPage.jsx to match the new editorial style, then proceed to Wave 5 app pages.
context_notes: We are mid-redesign of the entire travel diary frontend. The global CSS, navigation (floating circles), and landing page have been successfully rewritten with GSAP animations.
